title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

questions.question: Do you think modern parents are too protective of their children, and what effect might this have on children's development?
How has childhood changed in the last twenty to thirty years, and do you think today's children have better or worse experiences than previous generations?

script.text: Do you think modern parents are too protective of their children, and what effect might this have on children's development?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
